expectedIssues: Responsible gaming icon is missing from the top nav bar
reportedIssues: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are visibly cut off on the right side. Game titles like 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' are truncated mid-word with no scroll affordance (no arrows, no partial fade, no scroll indicator).
The 'Hot Ga...' navigation tab in the top filter bar is cut off mid-word, making it unreadable and appearing broken rather than intentionally scrollable.
The third game card in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' row shows only partial game art and title ('MAGNI PHO...'), giving no meaningful information to the user about what game it is.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a missing responsible gaming icon from the top nav bar; all reported issues focus on truncated/cut-off text in game cards and navigation tabs.
